title: GTA Online
headline: GTA Online
subtitle: Protect Los Santos and Acquire New Law Enforcement Vehicles During the Neighborhood Watch Event
content:
Clean up the streets and assist residents across Los Santos and Blaine County during the new Neighborhood Watch Event. This multifaceted special event now running through April 15 features a pair of new Bravado Buffalo Law Enforcement Vehicles hitting the streets, new Dispatch Work, and more.

Also, watch top streamers lay down the law on Twitch during our Neighborhood Watch Event to earn up to GTA$1,000,000 and the Winter Highway Patrol Outfit from April 2 – 15 with Twitch Drops.
